subject: chore(claude-md): replace Triggers section with glow-props v2026-04-17
body:
Cross-fleet policy: glow-props CLAUDE.md redesigned the Triggers
surface. Old 10-trigger single-word list (rev/aud/doc/tap/cln/perf/
sec/dbg/imp + start/go meta) is superseded by 48 triggers in 8
groups, 6 cadence meta sweeps, 7 reflective passes, and scope
modifiers (branch / staged / file <path>).

Fetched glow-props CLAUDE.md via the GitHub API pattern (direct
HTTPS to devmade-ai.github.io is blocked in this sandbox, so used
api.github.com/repos/devmade-ai/glow-props/contents/CLAUDE.md with
GITHUB_ALL_REPO_TOKEN). Extracted the ## Triggers section and dropped
it in verbatim.

Verification:
- grep -c '^## Triggers$' CLAUDE.md → 1.
- All 8 group headings present (Correctness / Security / Performance /
  User-facing / Maintainability / Operational / Design-level / Fleet
  alignment).
- No old trigger rows (review/audit/start/improve) remain.
- No old 'Trigger behavior' or '`start` / `go` behavior' subheadings.
- Scope modifiers + Meta sweeps + Reflective passes sections all
  present.
- Byte-diff of the extracted Triggers section against the glow-props
  source is empty (only difference was a stray blank line before the
  next `## Implementation Patterns` heading — trimmed).

Name collision note added to AI Notes: `docs` / `types` / `config` /
`api` / `state` / `tests` all double as repo folder/file/script names.
Precedence rule: interpret as a trigger only when the user's message
is the bare word (optionally + a scope modifier); any in-sentence use
is literal.

Tags: claude-md, triggers, fleet, policy
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
